definition_short: Measured tactile property: Haptic Fractal Dimension as reported by material or haptic data rather than visual appearance.
examples_positive: Material sample with measured Haptic Fractal Dimension.
Haptic data indicates Haptic Fractal Dimension.
examples_negative: No tactile measurements indicate Haptic Fractal Dimension.
Haptic Fractal Dimension is only inferred visually.
scope_includes: Measured tactile data reporting Haptic Fractal Dimension.
Material specs listing Haptic Fractal Dimension.
scope_excludes: Visual guesses of Haptic Fractal Dimension without tactile data.
Unverified descriptions of Haptic Fractal Dimension.
extraction_notes_2d: Not inferable from 2D imagery; requires material or tactile measurements.
extraction_notes_3d: 3D geometry alone is insufficient; use physical measurements or material data.
